rules.description: Blocks LLM responses that self-identify Sage as a mental health coach, therapist, or counsellor. Substitutes a canonical wellness companion statement. Applied post-generation so the LLM cannot bypass it.
patterns: i am a mental health professional

action.substitute_with: I'm Sage, a wellness companion here to offer emotional support and evidence-based coping tools. That's my role. What's been on your mind today?
action.message: Response contained a prohibited identity claim (coach/therapist/counsellor). Substituted with canonical wellness companion statement.
